task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bahmni home screen, clinic module, or application dashboard is visible, indicating the agent successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient is selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The clinical dashboard or patient record for 'James Osei' (Identifier: BAH000011) is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify Weight and Height are entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vitals or Observations form shows '72' entered in the Weight field and '175' entered in the Height field.
The Vitals or Observations form shows '78' entered in the Pulse field.

task_completion.description: Verify Blood Pressure is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vitals or Observations form shows '122' entered for Systolic Blood Pressure and '80' entered for Diastolic Blood Pressure.

task_completion.description: Verify the vital signs are saved/recorded
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, the vitals appear in the patient's recent observations/visit summary, or the save button has been clicked to record the form.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Bahmni web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Bahmni EMR GUI, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The vital signs and patient details are not just typed into a text editor, notepad, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Data is entered into the actual EMR system
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry occurs within the Bahmni application's specific clinical observation forms, matching the expected layout of the EMR.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient name is 'James Osei' and identifier is 'BAH000011'. The vital signs to verify are: Weight 72 kg, Height 175 cm, Pulse 78 bpm, Systolic BP 122 mmHg, Diastolic BP 80 mmHg.
